creator: clbuisson@orange.fr
text:
The chips driver 1.2.1 does not detect properly video chips.

This bug is recorded as bug 18122 in freedesktop bugzilla (2008/10/19 with driver version 1.2.0) and the patch committed on 2009/07/19

The driver 1.2.2 with the correction has been announced on 2009/09/19

Fix: upgrade driver to 1.2.2


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Try to start the Xorg server with chips driver 1.2.1, as used in the current FreeBSD port.
